title: plagiobothrys scouleri var. corallicarpus
intro: Plagiobothrys scouleri var. corallicarpus, also known as coastal whitetop, is a variety of the Plagiobothrys scouleri plant that belongs to the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Plagiobothrys scouleri var. corallicarpus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has also been used in folk remedies to treat various ailments.
